song.title: If I Gained the World But Lost the Savior
song.author: Anna Olander, tr. composite
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Dm C A# If I gained the world, but lost the Savior, .Dm C A# C Were my life worth living for a day? .A# C F Dm Could my yearning heart find rest and comfort .D# C In the things that soon must pass away?|| . F Dm F Dm If I gained the world, but lost the Savior, . F Dm F C Would my gain be worth the lifelong strife? .A# C F Dm Are all earthly pleasures worth comparing .A# C A# F For a moment with a Christ-filled life? [V2] .Dm C A# Had I wealth and love in fullest measure, .Dm C A# C And a name revered both far and near, .A# C F Dm Yet no hope beyond, no harbor waiting, .D# C Where my storm-tossed vessel I could steer.|| . F Dm F Dm If I gained the world, but lost the Savior, . F Dm F C Who endured the cross and died for me, .A# C F Dm Could then all the world afford a refuge, .A# C A# F Whither, in my anguish, I might flee? -!!
[V3] .Dm C A# Oh what emptiness without the Savior .Dm C A# C 'Mid the sins and sorrows here below! .A# C F Dm And eternity, how dark without Him! .D# C Only night and tears and endless woe!|| . F Dm F Dm What, though I might live without the Savior, . F Dm F C When I come to die, how would it be? .A# C F Dm Oh, to face the valley's gloom without Him! .A# C A# F And without Him all eternity! [V4] .Dm C A# Oh the joy of having all in Jesus! .Dm C A# C What a balm the broken heart to heal! .A# C F Dm Ne'er a sin so great, but He'll forgive it, .D# C Nor a sorrow that He does not feel!|| . F Dm F Dm If I have but Jesus, only Jesus, . F Dm F C Nothing else in all the world beside, .A# C F Dm Oh, then everything is mine in Jesus. .A# C A# F For my needs and more He will provide.
